creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Wed Sep 25 04:38:19 UTC 2019
New revision: 512767
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/512767

Log:
  New port: devel/ros-urdfdom_headers

  This package contains a the headers for the C++ parser for the Unified
  Robot Description Format (URDF), which is an XML format for
  representing a robot model in ROS.

  WWW: https://wiki.ros.org/urdf

  PR:		224897
  Submitted by:	Trenton Schulz <trenton@norwegianrockcat.com>

Changes:
  head/devel/Makefile
  head/devel/ros-urdfdom_headers/
  head/devel/ros-urdfdom_headers/Makefile
  head/devel/ros-urdfdom_headers/distinfo
  head/devel/ros-urdfdom_headers/pkg-descr
  head/devel/ros-urdfdom_headers/pkg-plist
